title: Calibration converges to a wrong basin (e.g. DS fold / EUCM alpha->1)

title: Planar two-fold (mirror) pose ambiguity inflates mean/p95 error
mitigation: Homography-based two-fold disambiguation in geometry.resection; synthetic planted-flip test

title: Internal R&D / process content leaks into the public repo
mitigation: Defence in depth: ignore rules + a local pre-push guard + the CI tree-hygiene gate

title: Analytic Jacobian regression slips in undetected
mitigation: jac gradient-check gate at 1e-6 on every model PR (NFR-NUM-001)

title: Architecture erodes (cycles / cv2 in math path) as features are added
Requirements and tests drift out of sync
mitigation: CI traceability gate (check_traceability.py) fails on orphan/dangling links

title: A release ships without real-data validation
mitigation: Release-gated requirements require a realdata test; pre-release validation job gates the release

title: Third-party dependency CVE (numpy/opencv/scipy/pyyaml)
mitigation: Pinned dev deps; SECURITY.md reporting; dependency review
